title: OG Starter Cup
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:OG Starter Cup}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=OG Starter Cup |icon= |tickername=OG Starter Cup |shortname=OG Starter Cup |image=OG Starter Cup.png |type=Online |team_number=20 |series=OG Starter Cup |organizer=OG Esports |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/_og.esports_/?utm_medium=copy_link/ |sponsor=[https://www.instagram.com/1m_organization/ 1M x Challenger Esports] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=1,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-10-03 |edate=2021-10-04 |instagram=1m_organization |youtube=c/1MOfficials |youtube2=UCh1KW0hv7z27XlPLHI619KA |twitter= |discord=7zM3ee8G6f }} '''[https://www.instagram.com/1m_organization/ 1M x Challenger Esports]''' in association with '''[https://www.instagram.com/_og.esports_/?utm_medium=copy_link/ OG Esports]''' present a BGMI invitational tournament called the '''''OG Starter Cup''''' with a prize pool of ₹1,00,000 INR. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Darshita|b1flag=in |b2=Boss JP|b2flag=in|b2name=Jitendra Patel |b3=HomeShow|b3flag=in|b3name=Hari Om Mishra |b4=Cronos|b4flag=in|b4name=Sunil Kumar Vikram |b5=Shuban Murthy|b5flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''OG Starter Cup:''' 1st September 2021 to 5th October 2021.'' '''''Pre-Qualifiers:''' 1st September 2021 to 9th September 2021'' * '' A total of 2000 teams will play in Pre-Qualifiers * '' Teams to be divided into 100 groups''. * '' Each team will get to play a single match'' * '' Top 10 Teams from each group will qualify for the Qualifiers''. * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 1000 teams}} advance to Qualifiers.''
'''''Qualifiers:''' 11th September 2021 to 15th September 2021'' * '' A total of 1000 teams will play in Qualifiers * '' Teams to be divided into 50 groups''. * '' Each team will get to play a single match'' * '' Top 8 Teams from each group will qualify for the Pre Quarter-Finals''. * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 380 teams}} ( Earlier 400) will advance to the Pre Quarter-Finals.''
'''''Pre Quarter-Finals:''' 17th September 2021 to 18th September 2021'' * '' A total of 380 teams will play in Pre Quarter-Finals * '' Teams to be divided into 19 groups''. * '' Each team will get to play a single match'' * '' Top 4 Teams from each group will qualify for the Quarter-Finals''. * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 76 teams}} advance to the Quarter-Finals.''
'''''Quarter-Finals:''' 20th September 2021'' * '' A total of 90 teams (76 Qualified + 14 Invited) will play in Quarter-Finals * '' Teams to be divided into 5 groups''. * '' Each team will get to play a total of 2 matches'' * '' Top 8 Teams from each group will qualify for the Semi Finals''. * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 30 teams}} advance to the Semi-Finals.''
'''''Semi Finals:''' 22nd September 2021'' * '' A total of 42 teams (30 Qualified + 12 Invited) will play in the Semi Finals'' * '' Teams to be divided into 2 groups''. * '' Each team will get to play a total of 3 matches'' * '' Top 7 Teams from each group will qualify for the Group Finals''. * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 14 teams}} will advance to the Group Finals.''
'''''Group-Finals:''' 24th September 2021 to 26th September 2021'' * '' A total of 40 teams (14 Qualified + 26 Invited) will play in the Group Finals'' * '' Teams to be divided into 2 groups''. * '' Each team will get to play a total of 6 matches'' * '' Top 2 Teams from each group will qualify for the Grand Finals''. * {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 4 teams}} will advance to the Grand Finals.''
'''''Grand Finals:''' 02 October 2021 to 3rd October 2021'' * '' A total of 20 teams (4 Qualified + 16 Invited) will play in the Grand Finals'' * '' Teams will get to play a total of 8 matches in a period of 2 days'' * '' Each day will feature a total of 4 matches'' ====Matchdays==== * ''2 Matchdays: 4 Matches Each Day.'' ** '''''Map Rotation''''': ''E>>M>>E>>M ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per finish'' |- !width=100px|Place !width=100px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-16}}||1 |- |{{Placement|17-20}}||0 |} ===Prize Pool=== ₹1,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $1355 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams and the players as seen below:
